gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用笑声包裹思念，以声音传递跨越生死的浪漫奇迹。
gems.whyWatchEn: A heartfelt romantic comedy where grief meets chance, proving love can travel through the most unexpected voicemails.
gems.audience: 喜欢温暖治愈、带点奇幻色彩的浪漫故事，以及注重情感细腻表达的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of heartwarming, slightly magical romance and emotionally nuanced storytelling.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 经典玩具再出发，直面数字时代陪伴方式的深刻变革。
gems.whyWatchEn: A bold, timely sequel that reimagines childhood through the lens of digital vs. physical play, with beloved characters facing a new frontier.
gems.audience: 陪伴《玩具总动员》长大的粉丝，以及关注当代儿童屏幕时间与实体玩具关系的家长。
gems.audienceEn: Toy Story fans who grew up with the franchise, and parents interested in the balance between screen time and traditional play.
